programme.title: Grand Prix of Miami Beach - Longines Global Champions Tour – Miami Beach Round 2026
programme.desc: The Longines Global Champions Tour Miami Beach 2026 brings elite show jumping to a spectacular seaside setting, with the world’s top riders and horses competing across multiple classes. The highlight is the Grand Prix, where precision, speed and technique are key. Set against the iconic Miami skyline, the event combines top-level sport with a unique atmosphere on one of the Tour’s most distinctive stages.

programme.title: HL H.H.the Father Amirs prix 2026 – jump off 1. 30 Meters – Week 4
programme.desc: A major international championship with 240 male and female riders from elite levels, representing 32 countries.

programme.title: Day 1 - Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup
programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

programme.title: HL H.H.the Father Amirs prix 2026 – Special Two-Phase 1.50 Meters – Week 4
programme.desc: A major international championship with 240 male and female riders from elite levels, representing 32 countries.

programme.title: Team – Round 1 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The GCL Team Round 1 opens the Rome leg at the Foro Italico. Two riders per squad chase fast, fault-free trips to set the overnight order and carry scores into Round 2. Expect tight time allowed, flowing lines, and smart tactics on stride counts and anchor placement as title contenders push for pole.

programme.title: Team - Round 2 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The decisive GCL Team Round 2. Reverse-order start from Round 1, with every rail and second counting toward the combined team total. Strategic rider swaps and cool heads over a technical track shape the podium and precious championship points in a high-stakes Roman finish.

programme.title: CSI5 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: Top combinations tackle elite CSI5* classes at the Foro Italico. A technical track, tight time allowed and related lines test precision and power, with the fastest clears advancing to a jump-off. Expect fine margins, inside turns and bold strides as riders chase ranking points and momentum for the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Grand Prix of Rome - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The 1.60m LGCT Grand Prix: one round plus jump-off for big championship points and a golden ticket to the Prague Playoffs Super Grand Prix. Huge oxers, delicate verticals and a demanding time allowed reward brave riding and perfect stride control in a high-stakes Roman finale.

programme.title: Team – Round 1 - Equestrian Global Tour Jumping - AL Riyadh
programme.desc: The Grand Prix of Riyadh marked the final stage of the Longines Global Champions Tour season in November 2025. programme.desc: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton. programme.title: Liverpool vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: None of the seven meetings between Liverpool and Paris SG in all competitions have been drawn, with two of the Reds’ three wins coming at home. Paris SG won 1-0 at Anfield in the UEFA Champions League last 16 last season. The only sides to win consecutive away games against Liverpool in European competition are Barcelona and Atalanta, with neither of those doing so in back-to-back campaigns.

programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Liga Extra -
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Les temps forts de la Liga sont a l'honneur: matchs cles, moments decisifs, analyses d'experts et decryptages tactiques vous plongent au cœur du football espagnol.

programme.title: Made in England -
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Revivez les moments cles et les matchs incontournables de la Premier League anglaise, avec des analyses d'experts, des commentaires pointus et des decryptages tactiques.

programme.title: Marseille vs Metz - Ligue 1 - J29 - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Une couverture en direct de la premiere ligue professionnelle de football en France, ou vingt equipes determinees s'affrontent dans des matchs electrisants pour decrocher le titre national tant convoite.

programme.title: Salon VIP - Magazine 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football, Sport magazine. Interviews exclusives de joueurs et temoignages de supporters passionnes : plongez dans les coulisses du football avec des points de vue d'inities, des histoires inedites et des debats enflammes autour du ballon rond. Host: Claire Arnoux.

programme.title: Ep 31 Inside Fra - This is Paris - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Suivez de pres le parcours du Paris Saint-Germain avec une couverture complete des dernieres infos, des resultats et des prochains rendez-vous, alors que le club emblematique continue de marquer l'histoire de la Ligue 1 depuis 1974.

programme.title: Rodez vs Troyes - Ligue 2 - J30 - Football 2025-2026

programme.desc: Held from 13–19 April at the Real Club de Tennis Barcelona, this ATP 500 clay-court event marks a key stage of the European clay swing. programme.title: EN MLB Plays of the Week 2026 | E1
Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: This will be the sixth time that Atlético Madrid and Barcelona have faced each other this season, which is their most meetings in a single campaign since 2013-14. Only in 1985-86 have they faced more than six times in the same season. As well as a 2-0 win in the first leg, Atlético Madrid have also beaten Barcelona 4-0 in the Copa Del Rey this season. They last beat them three times in the same campaign back in 1995-96.

programme.title: Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Qatar Major
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Sporting CP in European competition, while the Gunners are the team the Portuguese side have faced most often in Europe without ever winning. Sporting CP haven’t won away to an English team since March 2005, drawing five and losing five of their last 10 trips; four of which have been in the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Al Hilal SFC (KSA) vs Al Sadd SC (QAT) - AFC Champions League Elite 2025/2026 - West R16 1st Leg
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. programme.title: Liverpool vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: None of the seven meetings between Liverpool and Paris SG in all competitions have been drawn, with two of the Reds’ three wins coming at home. Paris SG won 1-0 at Anfield in the UEFA Champions League last 16 last season. The only sides to win consecutive away games against Liverpool in European competition are Barcelona and Atalanta, with neither of those doing so in back-to-back campaigns.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Sporting CP in European competition, while the Gunners are the team the Portuguese side have faced most often in Europe without ever winning. Sporting CP haven’t won away to an English team since March 2005, drawing five and losing five of their last 10 trips; four of which have been in the UEFA Champions League.

programme.desc: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season. Bournemouth have won two of their last three league games against Arsenal, more than they had in their previous 14.

programme.title: Liverpool vs. Fulham - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League games against Fulham. Only once have they had a longer run without a league win against the Cottagers. Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool, winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.

programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last nine Premier League games against Man City since a 2-1 away win in May 2021. Manchester City have won four of their last five away Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 26 league visits to Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: EST (TUN) vs MSFC (RSA) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - SF2 1st LEG
programme.desc: The CAF Champions League, is an annual club football competition organized by the Confederation of African Football (CAF) and contested by top-division African clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in African football and is live and exclusive only on beIN. The current champions are Pyramids Football Club from Egypt.

programme.title: Al Ahli Saudi FC (KSA) vs Al Duhail SC (QAT) - AFC Champions League Elite 2025/2026 - R16 1st Leg
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in Asian football, played by the national league champions. A total of 24 clubs compete in the league stage of the competition, divided into East and West regions (12 teams each). All games are live and exclusive only on beIN

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: This will be the sixth time that Atlético Madrid and Barcelona have faced each other this season, which is their most meetings in a single campaign since 2013-14. Only in 1985-86 have they faced more than six times in the same season. As well as a 2-0 win in the first leg, Atlético Madrid have also beaten Barcelona 4-0 in the Copa Del Rey this season. They last beat them three times in the same campaign back in 1995-96.

programme.title: Celta de Vigo vs Real Oviedo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Real Oviedo, keeping a clean sheet in both. Never in their history have the Galician side recorded three consecutive clean sheets against the Asturian side in the top-flight. Real Oviedo have not won any of their last nine away LaLiga games against Celta de Vigo, losing on their last six visits. This is their worst run of consecutive away defeats against the Vigo team in the competition's history.

programme.title: Athletic Club vs Villarreal - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Athletic Club are unbeaten in their last six LaLiga home games against Villarreal, never going seven consecutive home matches without a defeat against them in the competition. Villarreal CF are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga games against Athletic Club, keeping a clean sheet in both. The Yellow Submarine have never kept three consecutive clean sheets against the Rojiblancos in the top-flight.

programme.title: Levante vs Getafe - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Levante UD are unbeaten in their last nine home games against Getafe in LaLiga, keeping a clean sheet in the last four of those ; their best run without conceding at home against a single opponent in their entire top-flight history. Getafe CF are unbeaten in their last four LaLiga games against Levante and have only once gone five consecutive matches without defeat against them in the top-flight, which was in their first five encounters between 2004 and 2007.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Girona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Mallorca have not lost any of their 11 home games against Rayo Vallecano in LaLiga, and have not played more home matches without suffering a defeat against any other opponent in their entire top-flight history. Following their 2-1 victory in Vallecas in January 2026, Rayo Vallecano have the chance to complete a league double over Mallorca for the first time in LaLiga history.

programme.title: Real Sociedad vs Alavés - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Real Sociedad have not won any of their last two home games against Alavés in LaLiga and have only once gone three consecutive home matches without a win against the Vitoria side in the top-flight, between 1999 and 2002. Deportivo Alavés have won their last three games against Real Sociedad in LaLiga; they have only managed to win four consecutive matches against three teams in the entire history of the competition: UD Las Palmas in 2001, CD Tenerife in 2002 and Real Valladolid in 2003.

programme.title: Elche vs Valencia - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Elche CF have picked up points in three of their last seven LaLiga matches against Valencia, after doing so in just two of their previous 13 top-flight encounters. Valencia CF have won seven of their last nine away LaLiga matches against Elche, after managing just two victories in their first 15 visits to the Franjiverde's home ground in the top-flight.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: FC Barcelona are unbeaten in their last 29 LaLiga matches against Espanyol, their longest unbeaten run against a single opponent and the longest unbeaten run by a team in any derby in the competition's history. RCD Espanyol have not won an away LaLiga match against FC Barcelona since February 2009 under Mauricio Pochettino. Since then, Espanyol have only picked up one point in their following 14 visits to the Camp Nou in the competition : a 1-1 draw in December 2022.

programme.title: Sevilla vs Atlético de Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Sevilla FC have won three of their last five home games against Atlético de Madrid in LaLiga, after managing just one victory in their previous nine home meetings in the competition. Club Atlético de Madrid have won six of their last seven LaLiga matches against Sevilla, achieving as many victories as in their previous 17 top-flight encounters.

programme.title: Cruzeiro (BRA) vs Universidad Católica (CHI) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Fluminense (BRA) vs Independiente Rivadavia (ARG) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Osasuna vs Real Betis - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Osasuna have won just one of their last 15 LaLiga matches against Real Betis, a 3-2 victory in April 2023, suffering as many defeats as in their previous 32 top-flight encounters. Real Betis Balompié have won four of their last five away LaLiga matches against Osasuna, including the last two. The Verdiblancos have never won three consecutive away games against the Rojillos in the competition's history.

programme.title: Cruzeiro (BRA) vs Universidad Católica (CHI) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Rennes vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco and Lille picking up more points than SRFC over the period. Rennes are three points off the podium heading into this MD29, having been 11 points behind third place after MD21 and at the time of Habib Beye's dismissal.

programme.title: Paris FC vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Paris FC have lost two of their three home matches against Monaco in all competitions, with their last home game against ASM being their heaviest ever home defeat in Ligue 1. Paris FC are unbeaten in Ligue 1 since Antoine Kombouaré took charge, picking up nine points in five matches, as many as in the last 12 under Stéphane Gilli.

Auxerre have picked up 11 points in nine Ligue 1 matches since the start of February, seven more points than Nantes over the same period and only one fewer than they managed in their first 19 matches of the season.

programme.title: Mainz 05 vs Strasbourg - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: SUI v CZE - Doubles - Billie Jean King Cup Qualifiers - 2026 - Switzerland - Swiss Tennis Arena, Bie
programme.desc: Billie Jean King Cup Qualifiers 2026 sees 14 national teams competing in home-and-away ties across two days, with each tie decided by a best-of-five format. The seven winning nations secure their place in the Finals in Shenzhen, joining the host nation, while the remaining teams move to the play-offs. As the premier international women’s team tennis competition, the event showcases top players representing their countries in a high-stakes pathway to the title.

programme.title: Al-Shamal vs Qatar SC - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W17
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Nîmes vs Aix - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: All Goals FIFA ARAB Cup - 2025
programme.desc: All goals of the 2025 FIFA Arab Cup. It is the second edition under FIFA's jurisdiction. The tournament held in Qatar from 1 to 18 December 2025. Algeria are the defending champions.

programme.title: Toulouse vs Poitiers - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Alejandro Tabilo (CHI) Vs Joao Fonseca (BRA) - Day 2 - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda - Munich 2026
programme.desc: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. Featuring a 32-player draw, it offers approximately €595,000 in prize money, with leading players competing for ranking points during the early European clay season.

programme.title: Day 3 - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda - Munich 2026
programme.desc: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. Featuring a 32-player draw, it offers approximately €595,000 in prize money, with leading players competing for ranking points during the early European clay season.

programme.title: L.D.U. Quito (ECU) vs Mirassol (BRA) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.
